event: Hindu deities depicted in Indian art
description: An Indian painting on a golden-orange background depicting two deities. On the left, a serene multi-armed female figure sits on a white lotus cloud, adorned with jewelry and colorful garments, with a blue circular halo behind her. On the right, a dark skeletal or emaciated multi-armed figure dances energetically, wearing a crown with a crescent moon and adorned with coral-like ornaments. The figures are rendered in a traditional Indian painting style with fine line work and vibrant color.
